message:
build(web): implement isolated Next.js build scopes and fix tee hanging

- Added ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE environment variable support to isolate Next.js .next build directories for concurrent agent execution

- Added isolated npm scripts: build:isolated, start:isolated, lint:isolated, type-check:isolated

- Updated playwright config to use isolated build scope

- Fixed an issue in scripts/lib/error_tracking.sh where the tee process would hang waiting for the error FIFO to close

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ dist/
 build/
 out/
 .next/
+.next*/
 .vercel/
 
 # ----- Package manager -----
@@ -61,6 +62,7 @@ temp/
 *.tmp
 *.temp
 test_sed_flags.sh
+.tsconfig.next-*.json
 
 # ----- OS generated -----
 .DS_Store
@@ -72,7 +74,7 @@ ehthumbs.db
 
 # ----- Cache -----
 .cache/
-.eslintcache
+.eslintcache*
 .turbo/
 
 # ----- Beads -----

@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@
 
 # next.js
 /.next/
+/.next*/
 /out/
 
 # production
@@ -39,11 +40,12 @@ yarn-error.log*
 # typescript
 *.tsbuildinfo
 next-env.d.ts
+.tsconfig.next-*.json
 .env*.local
 playwright-ga4-session/
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
 
 # eslint cache

@@ -9,6 +9,7 @@ const eslintConfig = defineConfig([
   globalIgnores([
     // Default ignores of eslint-config-next:
     ".next/**",
+    ".next*/**",
     ".next_trash*/**",
     ".next_backup/**",
     "out/**",

@@ -5,9 +5,14 @@
   "scripts": {
     "dev": "next dev",
     "build": "next build",
+    "build:isolated": "bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-build-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; cp tsconfig.json \"$tsconfig\"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH=\"$tsconfig\"; next build'",
     "start": "next start",
+    "start:isolated": "bash -lc ': \"${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:?Set ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE to the same value used for build}\"; next start'",
     "lint": "eslint . --cache",
+    "lint:isolated": "bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-lint-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); eslint . --cache --cache-location \".eslintcache-${safe_scope}\"'",
     "type-check": "next typegen && tsc --noEmit --incremental false",
+    "type-check:isolated": "bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-typecheck-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; cp tsconfig.json \"$tsconfig\"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH=\"$tsconfig\"; next typegen && tsc -p \"$tsconfig\" --noEmit --incremental false'",
+    "verify:isolated": "bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-verify-$PPID}; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\"; bun run type-check:isolated && bun run lint:isolated && bun run build:isolated'",
     "test": "playwright test",
     "test:ui": "playwright test --ui",
     "test:headed": "playwright test --headed",

@@ -151,9 +151,9 @@ try_step() {
                 exit_code=$?
                 set -e
                 
-                # Close FIFO and wait for tee to finish
-                exec {fd}> "$fifo"
-                exec {fd}>&-
+                # Wait for tee to drain and exit, then clean up the FIFO.
+                # The command's exit already closed the write end of the FIFO,
+                # so tee will receive EOF and exit on its own.
                 wait "$tee_pid" 2>/dev/null || true
                 rm -f "$fifo"
             else
